dayahead.note: cfg05 single-model only; no catboost_spike_residual, no BGEW fusion in 2025 run

realtime.note: DA-Safe Baseline only; no SGDFNet assist

root_causes: MAIN_PATH_USES_CFG05_ONLY: Step 4 calls P16 cfg05 walkforward, not P31-P40 multi-model pool
CATBOOST_SPIKE_RESIDUAL_NOT_IN_MAIN_PATH: CatBoost model not loaded in main pipeline
BGEW_FUSION_NOT_APPLIED: No fusion weights in prediction ledger (single model only)
RESIDUAL_CORRECTED_NOT_FED_TO_LEARNER: da_corrected/rt_corrected were computed but ignored by learner/fusion (P124 fix applied)
REALTIME_ACTUAL_LEDGER_USED_WRONG_COLUMN: build_actual_ledger_from_raw_csv hardcoded 日前电价 for all tasks (P122 fix applied)
caveats: 2025 evaluation used cfg05 single model only, NOT the full trusted BGEW fusion
2025 realtime used DA-Safe Baseline (rt_pred=da_anchor), NOT SGDFNet assist
3.0 local window (June 2026) showed 9.23% sMAPE with BGEW fusion — NOT comparable to 2025 full-year cfg05-only
2.5 comparison not available (no 2.5 artifacts on this machine)
P122/P124 bug fixes applied post-2025 run; future runs will use corrected ledger column and residual-fed fusion

comparison_to_25.reason: 2.5 repo artifacts not available on evaluation machine

claimable: 3.0 realtime DA-Safe Baseline sMAPE: 33.03% (2025 full year)
3.0 local window BGEW fusion sMAPE: 9.23% (June 2026, trusted delivery)
not_claimable: 3.0 BGEW fusion on 2025 full-year (not yet run with multi-model ledger)
